options.label: fig-ROC
options.fig.cap: Receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve illustrating the hypothetical test performance across the full range of possible thresholds. The red marker denotes the threshold that maximizes the Youden index.

options.label: fig-FN5
options.fig.cap: Fagan nomogram for a diagnostic test with 80% sensitivity and 90% specificity, for a patient with a pre-test probability of disease of 5%.

options.label: fig-FN40
options.fig.cap: Fagan nomogram for a diagnostic test with 80% sensitivity and 90% specificity, for a patient with a pre-test probability of disease of 40%.
